root_text.sn29.4:1.2: Atha kho aññataro bhikkhu yena bhagavā …pe… ekamantaṁ nisinno kho so bhikkhu bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn29.4:1.3: “ko nu kho, bhante, hetu, ko paccayo, yena m’idhekacce jalābujā nāgā uposathaṁ upavasanti vossaṭṭhakāyā ca bhavantī”ti?
root_text.sn29.4:1.5: “Ayaṁ kho, bhikkhu, hetu, ayaṁ paccayo, yena m’idhekacce jalābujā nāgā uposathaṁ upavasanti vossaṭṭhakāyā ca bhavantī”ti.

translation_text.sn29.4:1.2: Then a mendicant went up to the Buddha … and asked him,
translation_text.sn29.4:1.3: “Sir, what is the cause, what is the reason why some womb-born dragons keep the sabbath, having transformed their bodies?”
